description_long: This is a tall, freestanding street lamp with a robust, octagonal base and a slender, vertical pole that culminates in a pointed finial. The lamp features a single, bell-shaped black lampshade suspended from a horizontal arm that extends from the upper section of the pole. The main structure is painted a vivid red, contrasting sharply with the matte black of the lampshade. The base appears solid and heavy, designed to anchor the lamp securely in place. The overall design is utilitarian with a slight decorative touch at the finial and base, making it suitable for urban streetscapes or parks. The lamp is likely constructed from metal for durability and weather resistance.
description: A tall, red metal street lamp with a black bell-shaped shade suspended from a horizontal arm, featuring a decorative pointed finial and a sturdy octagonal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical pole, pointed finial, and the black lampshade partially obscured behind the pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full horizontal arm and the black bell-shaped lampshade hanging clearly to the left of the pole.
description_view_2: Rear view with the pole and finial visible, and the lampshade mostly hidden behind the pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the horizontal arm and black lampshade hanging to the right of the pole.
